tasks.description: Create `src/challenges/inmemory_db.py` with an `InMemoryDB` class supporting `create_table(name, columns, primary_key)`, `drop_table(name)`, `insert(table, row)`, `select(table, where)`, `update(table, values, where)`, `delete(table, where)`. Tables stored as `dict[str, list[dict]]`. Columns defined as `dict[str, type]`. Primary key enforces uniqueness on insert. Type validation on insert rejects wrong column types.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All CRUD operations work correctly — insert stores rows, select retrieves with optional filtering, update modifies matched rows, delete removes matched rows

tasks.description: Create `tests/test_inmemory_db.py` with pytest tests covering: table creation/dropping, insert with primary key enforcement, select with and without filters, update with filters, delete with filters, error cases (duplicate table, missing table, type mismatches, duplicate primary key).
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All tests pass via pytest, covering CRUD operations, primary key constraints, type validation, and error cases

pr.title: Add simple in-memory database coding exercise
pr.description:
Implements a simple in-memory database module as a coding exercise.
Supports table creation with typed columns, primary key constraints,
and full CRUD operations with filtering.
pr.test_plan:
- Automated: pytest tests covering all CRUD operations, constraints, and error cases
- Manual: Run `pytest tests/test_inmemory_db.py -v` to verify all tests pass
